entry.title: International Maritime Law Institute Conducts New Staff Enhancement Training for CMF

entry.title: Operation Compass Rose VI Strengthens Maritime Cooperation
entry.summary: MANAMA, Bahrain— Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) successfully concluded Operation Compass Rose VI, its flagship multinational training engagement, April 20-22, 2026. This year, the engagem…

entry.title: Combined Maritime Forces Maintains Operations During Middle East Conflict
entry.summary: MANAMA, Bahrain – Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) has continued to deliver operational outputs despite the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, maintaining uninterrupted maritime security activ…

entry.title: Indian Navy-led CTF 154 conducts staff training aboard INS Surat

entry.title: India Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’ CombinedTask Force 154
entry.summary: MANAMA, Bahrain – The Indian Navy assumed command of Combined Task Force (CTF) 154, from the Italian Navy during a change of command ceremony, presided over by U.S. Navy Vice Adm. Curt Renshaw, com…

entry.title: Supporting Stability and Resilience in Kyrgyzstan: UK statement to the OSCE, July 2026
entry.summary: The UK welcomed the OSCE Programme Office in Bishkek’s work supporting Kyrgyzstan’s stability, resilience and development. The Office’s contributions to border security, democratic governance, human rights, economic resilience and regional co-operation demonstrated the value of the OSCE’s field presence.

entry.title: Panama: information for victims of rape and sexual assault
entry.summary: Information for victims of rape and sexual assault in Panama.

entry.title: France travel advice
entry.summary: FCDO travel advice for France. Includes safety and security, insurance, entry requirements and legal differences.

entry.title: Russia: list of designations and sanctions notices
entry.summary: List of designated persons and notices issued about new designations, revocations, delistings and other changes to the UK Sanctions List.

entry.title: The UK Sanctions List
entry.summary: Find out which people, entities and ships are designated or specified under regulations made under the Sanctions and Anti-Money Laundering Act 2018, and why.

entry.title: ASEAN-UK Dialogue Partnership: plan of action 2027 to 2031
entry.summary: UK Foreign Secretary Ed Miliband agreed the ASEAN-UK Plan of Action with ASEAN foreign ministers in Manila on 22nd July 2026.

entry.summary: The Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) annual report and accounts for the financial year 2025 to 2026.

entry.title: ODIHR’s latest report adds to the growing evidence of Russia’s contemptible conduct in Ukraine: UK statement to the OSCE
entry.summary: The UK condemned Russia’s ongoing aerial attacks on Ukraine and cited ODIHR’s latest report which shows evidence of civilian harm, arbitrary detention and efforts to erase Ukrainian identity in the temporarily occupied territories.
